name: Hastings Tufted Storage Ottoman - Christopher Knight Home: Elegant Bonded Leather, Soft-Close Lid
description:
Complement almost any decor with the perfect accessory while giving yourself a great conversation piece. Perfect for your living room, foyer, or bedroom, this ottoman bench boasts convenient storage space while offering your decor a stunning look. With lovely button-tufting, diamond stitching, and soft pressure hinges, this ottoman is an ideal addition for any home, adding class and function to your interior space. This ottoman will tie your home together with its versatility and chic looks that will impress for years to come.

CONTEMPORARY DESIGN: Featuring deep button tufting and diamond stitching, our storage ottoman offers the look, feel, and design of a truly contemporary piece. With a minimalistic yet refined structure, this piece brings out a simplistic style that emphasizes comfort and functionality.

BUTTON TUFTED DIAMOND STITCH: The button-tufted stitching in the lid offers an extra touch of sophistication that enhances its contemporary design. The diamond stitch pattern adds a bit of texture without sacrificing any comfort.

VERSATILE: This ottoman bench can function as extra seating while you put on your shoes or can act as storage space for all of your pillows and blankets. This uses pressure hinges so that the lid will stay open on its own and will also ensure a soft close.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your furniture. This storage ottoman is 49.75” W x 19.75” D x 17.75” H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of this charming ottoman.

ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Some assembly is required for this ottoman bench. All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included.
